title: MySQL optimizer chooses the wrong index due to 'range_uses_more_keyparts'
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(a int not null, b binary(32) NOT NULL, c datetime NOT NULL, d int, PRIMARY KEY (a), INDEX i_bc(b,c), INDEX i_bd(b,d));
INSERT INTO test_table(b,c,d) SELECT HEX(UUID()), NOW(), FLOOR(RAND() * 100) FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE b = (SELECT b FROM test_table LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AND c < '2019-01-01 00:00:00';
key_bug_features: Optimizer chooses wrong index based on key parts
